title: calophyllum pisiferum
intro: Calophyllum pisiferum, also known as the Beeswax tree, is a species of plant in the family Calophyllaceae, native to tropical Australia and Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Calophyllum pisiferum include its antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support immune function. Calophyllum pisiferum is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as oils, tinctures, and salves, and is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections.
